title: Weltbrand
writer: Jakob Wassermann, Paul Georg, Bobby E. Lüthge
actors: Conrad Veidt, Lillebil Ibsen, Hermann Vallentin
plot: Christian Wahnschaffe, the spoiled son of an industrialist, meets Iwan Becker, a leader in the Russian Nihilist movement. Impressed by Becker's concern for society's weak and poor, Christian develops sympathies for the movement's ide
